textByHash.6f216951f1adcc5c70c5671db98deeb8e108e192: What right have ye to be so happy, landlubber?
textByHash.652c0f85618161c16ef4aabdf287ddda8d18ad44: Will ye forgive an old sailor his temper lad? I'm in dire straits indeed.
textByHash.8bd3158b686bd30f67d4633820d2c830d60b82db: Will ye forgive an old sailor his temper lass? I'm in dire straits indeed.
textByHash.f532e39b63ad312793fffd7325a1fab03d87bbfe: Will ye forgive an old sailor his temper kid? I'm in dire straits indeed.
textByHash.78b3f1a7f2628958a13ff08632e7fa0812ddb64e: I dunno, lad, I need a pirate to help me with my problem, but none will sail with me.
textByHash.e68db6f21c800558c9c9971c388402aa596641b9: I dunno, lass, I need a pirate to help me with my problem, but none will sail with me.
textByHash.b1d514a026a93395cdcc560808323b149bc3d1d3: I dunno, kid, I need a pirate to help me with my problem, but none will sail with me.
textByHash.4d3197275311e5f05b279beb147fe84d5a2f505d: Well, ye look like ye might have the right stuff, tell me would ye like te be a pirate?
textByHash.b2130fa1dbc062c31b0f18b6e45287e69310c75a: It takes more grit than most have te be a pirate, and I don't think ye've got what it takes lad.
textByHash.afffa7508776d9d13d42b9472c5682fe2e91ec1a: It takes more grit than most have te be a pirate, and I don't think ye've got what it takes lass.
textByHash.e48be463c26acfc93983e1a64759028ef7d0ec17: It takes more grit than most have te be a pirate, and I don't think ye've got what it takes kid.
textByHash.2a5fdb959806ae526f84905db2f6eabda64f230e: Well lad, I don't think ye could pirate yer way out of a chest full of piracy.
textByHash.4f811705613f24a612a82649e5eac2113535191f: Well lass, I don't think ye could pirate yer way out of a chest full of piracy.
textByHash.bd8f4075137d35edf1debeedca89b2bc9200f9fa: Well kid, I don't think ye could pirate yer way out of a chest full of piracy.
textByHash.65c762cf3d98f1f942acfe7995b4fba701754300: But since nobody else will risk the trip ye'll do!
textByHash.2390a2a77c6c9880617ef8b54c89146f3302dbae: Well lad, I be Bill Teach, the Captain of the Adventurous, one of the finest ships ever to sail these waters.
textByHash.f074297d37036783fe323af0a0753e8d3261ee90: Well lass, I be Bill Teach, the Captain of the Adventurous, one of the finest ships ever to sail these waters.
textByHash.7a23e02aabee10d577ff1528954ef045a6f2d590: Well kid, I be Bill Teach, the Captain of the Adventurous, one of the finest ships ever to sail these waters.
textByHash.b88859ec45715945c6c167bd28a518332e736cd8: I'm in port doin' some legitimate tradin' before headin' back to Mos Le'Harmless.
textByHash.e29201790a06d0cf66c73775c892d9d2834922e9: It's a pirate stronghold off the southern coast of Morytania. Been in existence for years it has and I reckon it's the best place for pirates to relax!
textByHash.a0bec568d88c969ec8ad5f97a5b1397c13f1b741: Well, one of the best... A lot be liking the Pandemonium these days, and Brimhaven does have that fancy Agility Arena...
textByHash.1df84aed3282c1f2814b4abfad93d6f072c51714: Of course lad, once we make landfall ye'll have worked as a sailor on a pirate vessel, which is one of the easiest ways to become a true pirate.
textByHash.78e2d953a2025f74dd2e20497bf89da668b9506f: Of course lass, once we make landfall ye'll have worked as a sailor on a pirate vessel, which is one of the easiest ways to become a true pirate.
textByHash.9639285134f0700b2b7b3a1ad2c9384462b3658a: Of course kid, once we make landfall ye'll have worked as a sailor on a pirate vessel, which is one of the easiest ways to become a true pirate.
textByHash.983dde9ad7a3f2b15395d2f7d462fa832d0ded39: Of course ye do, lad! Plenty be claiming they've got what it takes to be a pirate, but I can't be takin' ye word 'till I see it for myself.
textByHash.48c1aad24802d0236ed5f4db459c084fe45da6af: Of course ye do, lass! Plenty be claiming they've got what it takes to be a pirate, but I can't be takin' ye word 'till I see it for myself.
textByHash.1c8c395f1e89994426ae64513e7cb4e9e115af77: Of course ye do, kid! Plenty be claiming they've got what it takes to be a pirate, but I can't be takin' ye word 'till I see it for myself.
textByHash.ccb15c0c57bd63d813b8cce5d0398c9e04a03c6f: This brings me back to the reason I'm stuck here of course, and the reason I need your help.
textByHash.9449531e04a0ae87a7739e8137145ef3abb2f927: Last night I got into a war o' words with another Cap'n, and he has vowed to sink my ship and put all of my crew to the sword.
textByHash.16f4a48f46516f6188358d3cfe0afc0fea24ed68: The second I leave port I'll come under attack. I think I'll be able te make it if I have another person helpin' out, but I wouldn't stand a chance by me self.
textByHash.f7b8fa798a09abd10a78c20d676a3bee7a63edc5: Ye said ye would help me out lad, will ye stand by yer word?
textByHash.c560cd7af076aaa84b19371eb651b430aab18043: Ye said ye would help me out lass, will ye stand by yer word?
textByHash.57bfb0c8d0372f2604ce9083f77081f9a0e5319c: Ye said ye would help me out kid, will ye stand by yer word?
textByHash.907641df0a6d3dae5443a91f6bcf7ff214fa2681: Arr! Ye struck me as a man of integrity!
textByHash.daf9fb8d39eb1a5e7b4183304ddbe3f91f9ab65b: Arr! Ye struck me as a woman of integrity!
textByHash.6f6aeb57ccf5cbf45567ffb10437ebf2ae30f600: My ship is the Adventurous, and she's at the east dock.
textByHash.30e66e1b58bcbec236322a63a4acfdb4784ea889: Well, that doesn't surprise me much.
textByHash.78684eaaf6a6e59ee7fe5682b01184dd9d7a4aab: On yer way lad, leave me be.
textByHash.560680752541c1d47bc4ebad21488ef311a87507: On yer way lass, leave me be.
textByHash.560a0bc64c4b26289cb2dd3e6f9932af8f2e0dde: On yer way kid, leave me be.
textByHash.0848560ed792186592f590fbd6fdadae84af7622: Aye, that it be. Come back when yer liver ain't so lily-like, lad.
textByHash.efa647613352f46be5edb0102e2d8b439cef879c: Aye, that it be. Come back when yer liver ain't so lily-like, lass.
textByHash.ad3e66450c2f9fd147be887053950e9ae4428fd5: Aye, that it be. Come back when yer liver ain't so lily-like, kid.
textByHash.4f57b406f2dbd67ab2e3829ca76ef18cbb169fea: Let me finish my drink, landlubber!
textByHash.875337b5f357238cfdc81af1c82dd524f6725799: If ye ain't up te scratch as a pirate I may not get another one.
textByHash.e84ff1d586426a7acff1e56f97ecea1935a947eb: Just remember, he's all ye could get, Bill, and maybe ye'll get through it...
textByHash.eaa5fc0e386ff9952d4315ee863dd08276feef14: Just remember, she's all ye could get, Bill, and maybe ye'll get through it...
textByHash.8806b4ccedb62ef2052eb954fac41fe516c12f1f: Well, I had the feelin' ye might have run off when ye realised how much of a task ye had ahead of ye.
textByHash.e0d7d106e8708fa194ba15875150c84bdf1cf4fa: Aye, I should have remembered ye was eager.
textByHash.5d41d591348635c46aafc5e59e4caa8d6bc7467e: Ye all ready to go lad?
textByHash.778784e09c081503a7b6fb0038a407fb8d52a97b: Ye all ready to go lass?
textByHash.f2d3abbad140a67086ba6dc9684d00cc45184eb6: Aye lad, take yer time, I'm not goin' anywhere without ye.
textByHash.131711603c10b33eb47b3a20eb81bb3ab6e2567c: Aye lass, take yer time, I'm not goin' anywhere without ye.
textByHash.82b4d52e1ea94d115c46b5009fce8f618f3672f4: Well, without anyone else te help ye'll have te do some hard work if we don't want to end up walkin' home on the sea bed.
textByHash.d0a6c7374a9c89cb0a595c29fb83d89e626c6862: Well if their first shot hadn't taken out the cannon I'd be firing that at them.
textByHash.06c83ee573af15cbf7d1cc6d9f743b05c798721a: Arr! They seek te hole the ship! Go and take care of their cannon.
textByHash.8021c2ff0c3c6dce9865a265dba0b0affaae8e4a: If ye grab some fuse from the gun locker, and a rope from the repair locker, then ye can use the rope on the sails to swing over and deal with their cannon.
textByHash.588d0194ecbbad497470da187db2eaf5ba2d4442: Just take the fuse, use it on the barrel of gunpowder next to the cannon, and then light it with something.
textByHash.af0f089c54276a1f48166eb1bdb3fbaf38d5b803: A lantern, a tinderbox, it doesn't matter.
textByHash.76aecb3e8f68958254849868ce89e8a9d0821a21: They have masts as well don't they?
textByHash.bbdc58833544f660376eceeca639bfa86cf874e5: Just do the same trick using some rope on their sails and swing over.
textByHash.16bf908ceb88398ca45b2ddc4fcc041b32548a5d: Ye ain't a pirate yet by a long shot!
textByHash.4be712976b77204bb45f9044d687c6ba7a3235d4: I'll be on deck if ye need me.
textByHash.10d0c6358c9241e1fc5deb6fdc2be5f9021f8cb4: Well, ye'll need to silence their cannon before it sinks us. Before ye do that though, ye'll need to swing over to their ship.
textByHash.b82a193b08ea771562dd179ab3f26ad5e9d89945: Yer not much of a pirate are ye lad?
textByHash.6ac9e3cb19f13739fcd3b48ac1793986f2a55666: Ye climb up the mast and use a rope on the sails up there.
textByHash.3188b1c11e225ea34816eae505389c2815a8a743: Then ye climb down and ye swing on the rope.
textByHash.524cbdc17a0c434a0d213c098c58ae8d5725c0b0: If I have te explain how ye do THAT then I might as well just send out some biscuit weevles to do the job instead.
textByHash.f3539a08124e35558bba496e4175a95752113309: Well, ye'll need some fuse from the cannon locker below decks.
textByHash.5899ba4b8e594ac5c33a9061d3f7ae082c6b1a74: Swing over to the enemy ship and put the fuse in the barrel of gunpowder they'll have next to the cannon to speed up their firin'.
textByHash.07315bcf2d20401206535f3ce7e6c6843f74791b: Then, use something on the fuse te get it lit. A tinderbox, candle or any sort of flame will do.
textByHash.7cc3216519eacb149dab55972e58163ecdc9491c: After that ye just step back and let it burn by its self.
textByHash.3299a7edee8d08ddef6a235b2b645a06670b9725: Got a little scared now have we?
textByHash.ac6c8f126e7e8aed411680d10ee7a6e451b6b36c: Are ye sure ye can't get by without it?
textByHash.020446cf968a75abe8ae68adf6aae7aea3c04d8a: Well, as much as this is an interestin' break, why don't ye head back to the ship and we'll see if we can beat them this time?
textByHash.fc7217add64e9930d1807f582dd6c95f92a335ee: All right, lad let's try this again. This time, try not te run away!
textByHash.359c2f5afdc608beb1c0f14a79130bc0f15c6f01: One look at the enemy and ye run away.
textByHash.e75c6271e507b781af67f9e5479d184cd8120b6b: Get over there and take out their cannon before I throw ye there me self.
textByHash.9f3acd8ba843389a6aea4d45dccc0b11c5b55a44: Yer not a pirate yet lad, so stop talkin' like that!
textByHash.a4e0b43e37f05af860a003b530d28fdcc481b4e6: Yer not a pirate yet lass, so stop talkin' like that!
textByHash.8fc6d83f4b4fd6a701da0e5c7aa5dd7576157b9f: Well, ye've sorted out their cannon, but we're takin' on water.
textByHash.2b0db275074cdc8e6ffd9a26b0bbe7bbce0c5452: Go below deck and sort out the leaks.
textByHash.066bab999b9af0ad03dced9e88190cc8258ca67e: No lad, these holes were made by cannon fire.
textByHash.aadce37577126fc137391317d574d2a503bf7d18: No lass, these holes were made by cannon fire.
textByHash.b02ee5ad65d2861fe6edb54ca699213ea3f76dda: Ye'll need to get some planks from the repair locker and tack them in place. Then ye smear swamp paste over the planks to seal the hole.
textByHash.e133ad519b185055ea4a3099903dd677c423cdb8: Wait 'till we make landfall before ye start actin' like a pirate!
textByHash.ecd1480279d70394f6b55cd9e60299831620fc25: This is what I get when I ask random strangers for help...
textByHash.c076eff33c225529de723d8466db5ac949affec4: Looks like they haven't been back to port to get that cannon fixed, which is lucky.
textByHash.1dfa44249157699266a0c41832ce64fc21b977b0: Get below and fix the holes in the hull pronto, or we'll sink before they have a chance te kill us!
textByHash.1580e336f8ff93d9cc65b01eb054191cd982492c: Why not pay them a visit and go plunder their hold?
textByHash.e746ea65d5f4b19a57c83577ef2718020680b96a: Come back here and drop it in the chest in the hold.
textByHash.6ae149b93c39052581971467e58217e2276447a1: I've been a pirate all me life and I've never heard anyone keep harpin' on like that!
textByHash.22fd9e7f23ac0fb051cf9d22a461eaf13e656cd0: Ten! Can't ye count that high?
textByHash.cc8d4ddfc9758ffa53232666aa494ef6d0c7addc: Then ye wait for the pirates to stash some more in the hold. Since they are under attack they'll be dumpin' their gold and stuff in there every chance they get.
textByHash.23347387d25db7fb196f547cea4c160759d5758d: Just give it a minute and head back!
textByHash.dd51dbd4d2349b5dba16d84d620714eaffb7ca74: Yer not making any friends here lad, just go and do it.
textByHash.d23f5be343b44594e48c3fb361280d8379ab1d8f: Yer not making any friends here lass, just go and do it.
textByHash.68b2d5df5d6958928eb7dda1a563251a1f85e727: When yer quite done runnin' away lad ye've got a load of plunder to be grabbin'!
textByHash.4545a5ab01363bb3c769780dd3a7e4e6c05ccf05: I warn ye, lad, if the first word out of yer mouth is 'Arr' I'll be wearing yer spleen as a novelty hat before ye reach the second 'r'!
textByHash.b4d0ef4b37f50553b80b06a14fd2e0b91ae24dd6: I warn ye, lass, if the first word out of yer mouth is 'Arr' I'll be wearing yer spleen as a novelty hat before ye reach the second 'r'!
textByHash.b9f7d9b4a0e2b07e3100e8b469aaf137de7225b3: I should have seen that comin'
textByHash.20ec63e269b699b2417b3572080a40cd0435d017: Not yet! Let's give em a blast with the cannon before we leave!
textByHash.b2cfcbe899a8bd98c5cf806e13c802e720111c2c: Alright lad, try and stay with me on this one.
textByHash.d4e3976ed192338f8e99badc5dbbae91bac70bbc: Alright lass, try and stay with me on this one.
textByHash.c94483a16d5064ae0d25f31de16b2e322e9ff834: See, there is a secret technique for making things that be broken right again.
textByHash.a26724f5368b5354fe79cf6151c733df111a3a41: Ye need to remove the old barrel, then replace it with a new one from the gun locker downstairs.
textByHash.4c7d2be31e00c465f17a8ec0f3329795c26de5e6: I don't want to overload ye with too many details right now. Come tell me when the cannon is ready again.
textByHash.822b722dbc4efc1821e9d700ce25ebe4bc3d6baa: If ye know what is good for ye, yer off to fix the cannon!
textByHash.69602309666fe0bcded87be9ca6fb3bfe0991b00: By replacing the broken barrel with a new one! Hop to it lad, the salt air is clearly eatin' into yer brains!
textByHash.721db1b047bfbc87eb5c027304a17154181ccecd: By replacing the broken barrel with a new one! Hop to it lass, the salt air is clearly eatin' into yer brains!
textByHash.6658ea4e71d4a3abba7b58be6ebead07a92a2a2d: Have ye sorted out the cannon yet?
textByHash.56257b3dd10c89bcf91bc380004ebecd6ca3b2dd: Have ye fixed the cannon yet, yes or no.
textByHash.e000cb927a98eca84f3fb8fe0d93935fdfe5e7fb: Now ye can give those pirates a good shot across their bows.
textByHash.58d1d4e0f9df43601cafafbcc1a054fef2699c47: Ye'll need to load the cannon, and if ye get it wrong the barrel will blow, and ye'll need to start again.
textByHash.05d72f9c29d879dbf097d4a2d0b3a80f9be26c7c: First, ye take some powder from the powder keg.
textByHash.b4ab3e121420da4a06fc5fa85f1008e03ac23dde: Then ye use a ramrod from the gun locker on the powder to tamp the charge.
textByHash.b7e43ff7f6269c409c594d15f12ed47b8bee59f6: Then ye use a canister round on the cannon.
textByHash.3e74baea3d0abdb740492c354511eded9d47f5a4: Finally ye use some fuse on the cannon, and light it like ye did the fuse on the barrel earlier.
textByHash.7274e00b1f433fb99f9a64d82dcf47f918a04816: Then, ye'll need to use the ramrod on the cannon to clean it out for the next shot.
textByHash.327e5ebdcc9c9579b7f293cbf28a298e02899adb: And te think this was all I could get te help...
textByHash.2c67014768915ab7701bef52c0e031623e12aded: I can guess from the lack of an explosion that ye haven't fired the cannon yet, correct?
textByHash.900d05a858a811edd5a832c15c9c0bc43ecd720c: And I'll bet ye want a quick recap of how to do it, correct?
textByHash.67a908ae52333a260009e348434dedce56ae733f: Ye got all that this time?
textByHash.2d0ed352391609cec33a88d5117ddec7fce20f5f: Yer still not a pirate, so cut that out!
textByHash.bd12c5a11b487dfbc301e21ee9a8682363c0a53f: We were on the home stretch lad why did we turn back?
textByHash.a907e3ac75a9c3bbd96eca707714c09174bc67d2: Never mind, just go shoot the pirates and let's press on.
textByHash.f3c8cbeec22ac1c83619061b6a3bc960f9743b72: Great! This ordeal will soon be over!
textByHash.d913161412b2963956ac1a05abaf575829c4fe09: Now lad, we'll send them to the bottom of the sea.
textByHash.e6828863abe66bf16245e806098d7cbc230c3109: Now lass, we'll send them to the bottom of the sea.
textByHash.bd29d523d61b706038c4812e507b5b3703430f27: Well, ye'll shoot holes in their hull with the cannon.
textByHash.db542988a0e2db344e34d7ab73732da2c3d2bcac: Essentially ye do what ye just did, but use a cannonball from the gun locker in the hold instead of the canister rounds.
textByHash.c7166c9a330a1ba7dec0fda364dcb85cc5b5174a: Give it three tries and see if they sink, that many holes should do it.
textByHash.c003f787010e63baacbb8bf3e5eade44dd4eaf93: Three! Three times lad! Three! One more than two, one less than four! Got it!
textByHash.5877062adbfa0aed84afb6ba3de644561e4b1e00: Three! Three times lass! Three! One more than two, one less than four! Got it!
textByHash.69e7e1a23538e2609cb4489da59e3d99021be0c2: Were almost there! Just hole their hull and we'll be able to make it past. Get to it!
textByHash.13dc93a8284f77c0bbe183af6dbb418c31875a4e: Ye've done it lad! They're sunk now!
textByHash.11dbf839923e06af7dd36fb6fb0521a6d2b70ff1: Ye've done it lass! They're sunk now!
textByHash.897a1b0c560b04095988c00a3e52dd6ce2f5863c: Oh, Miss La'Fiette, if only I were that lucky.
textByHash.2133b2cd4e7d06a284ab9dc1c5ccebcfc5dfd5cb: My crew deserted and I was stuck with an adventurer mannin' me ship.
textByHash.23939e4cb0d238bc4a8c0224a4e8678308a40467: He was as piratical as a bunch of Dwellberries...
textByHash.ba2fd09b215ba17b9e248367cf09430af111d3af: She was as piratical as a bunch of Dwellberries...
textByHash.e459ad44a1f1ef671a2e8f9673817ca44a82e864: Ok , yer now a pirate, but...
textByHash.0fa7f2d526d196a6091011152c1729a9abb14798: BUT ye can't just go around talking like some pirate in a fancy play.
textByHash.8801214c0097a1201678d99915f42e0b6b0cfb50: No self-respectin' pirate says 'Arr' that much!
textByHash.78c65b4f29e9698ad9642db76d3b05fe08965948: Well, except for Fancy Dan, but that be another story.
textByHash.71762d126021ce3ee81b5fb3cd00c9112cae2550: Here, have this book. It'll learn ye how to be a pirate.
textByHash.d1d53cb0143a7de62aa0e629a40a0b145db30a57: Or at least learn ye te talk proper like one.
textByHash.ab1d24173aaee3f6f25e7ae1e8cf22f57939b885: Aye...that be all ye need te do.
textByHash.deac36fa6db6aa1a60232852ad60facae0d621c1: Ye'll need that book if ye want te trade with some of the pirates round here.
textByHash.6ecbf4b861ca293b6c9651bbf3defb164223ad92: Outsiders tend not te understand them if ye catch me drift.
textByHash.bbd679276e737bcb317b3718b7d5d413124fa8ae: Anyway, I'd have been shark bait without ye.
textByHash.efa44f16c709d6559e5c953a52e8baccd5cba4c6: If ye get a moment come see me fer yer share of the loot.
textByHash.43f8d258e98d5f9239e241b3a6c503fef5cff142: I'm sure as soon as ye stop yellin' 'Arr!' ye'll make a great pirate.
textByHash.396d954ce3cb76045d33b2dda833e97af81544fa: Thanks . If ye need a lift back, just come see me.
textByHash.8144633cbc7e36f3ab3513324daf78942fc77a21: If yer after a lift go to the ship and I'll take ye where ye want to go.
textByHash.6a16d07404135cd19f3e0a28b7f46f4249a60446: I suppose ye'll be wantin' a lift while yer here, right lad?
textByHash.daf6c11e6ae984fb823923a64cec98f0f6de1313: I suppose ye'll be wantin' a lift while yer here, right lass?
textByHash.b18c950565ad178b94d367dab106b24fb61a6158: I suppose ye'll be wantin' a lift while yer here, right kid?
textByHash.97faed87b588a38c609094423b3b2e576f33e638: Ye'll notice I'm not fallin' to the floor in shock right now. Look, if I gives ye another copy will ye keep a better eye on it?
textByHash.0f377e70fb7e051e6360051adf02f4d64dcf0a56: Then here, have this other copy I dug up.
textByHash.e940fb7ae86d3589d8eae274175a1c18c35917fe: No, I should be gettin' back anyway. Come on lad, let's be off.
textByHash.393e6c6f3ba622dc31b22480b715ffd246eb55e8: No, I should be gettin' back anyway. Come on lass, let's be off.
textByHash.22ea1dafa06d3a188668eeab99e17fbbe3f6b4e9: No, I should be gettin' back anyway. Come on kid, let's be off.
